title: hymenophyllum australe
intro: Hymenophyllum australe, also known as the New Zealand button fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum australe include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Hymenophyllum australe can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
